appliedUpdates.description: Replaced a stale milestone-specific browser session example with generic guidance to use the browser session assigned by the current validator prompt.

executionNotes: Task-based flow validator launches failed because the configured custom model resolved to invalid model custom:GPT-5.4-(XHigh)-3, so the main validator executed the equivalent API and browser flows directly and wrote the flow reports itself.
Canvas/WebGL surfaces required DOM-assisted inspection for the entity graph and a restart of the isolated browser session to apply a fixed download directory for the markdown export evidence.
